noPermissionBot: -# **I need the following permissions to run this command:** {permissions}
noPermmisionUser: -# **You need the following permissions or roles to run this command:** {permissions}
commandDisabledInChannel: - **This command is disabled in this channel.**
commandDisabledInRole: - **This command is disabled for your roles.**
noMongoDB: - **I need a MongoDB connection to run this command.**
cooldown: - **Please wait {time} before using the command again.**
ownerOnly: - **This command is only for the server owner.**
dmOnly: - **This command can only be used in direct messages.**
guildOnly: - **This command can only be used in a server.**
devOnly: - **This command is only for the bot developer.**
error: - **An error occurred while executing the command.**
developerOnly: - **This command is only for the bot developer.**
notAllowedGuild: - **This command is not allowed in this server.**
commandError: - **An error occurred while executing the command.**

checkDm.dmOpenSelf:
✅ **Your DMs are open!**
-# Check your direct messages — a test message was sent to you.
checkDm.dmOpenOther:
✅ **{user}'s DMs are open!**
-# A test message was sent to them.
checkDm.dmClosedSelf:
❌ **Your DMs are closed.**
-# To receive notifications, go to **Server Settings → Privacy Settings** and enable **Direct Messages**.
checkDm.dmClosedOther:
❌ **{user}'s DMs are closed.**
-# They need to enable **Direct Messages** in their Server Privacy Settings.
